title: CaseDigest
description: Schema for CaseDigest in Nuix REST API

creationDate.description: The date/time this case was created, in milliseconds since epoch

compound.description: Whether this case is Simple or Compound

elastic.description: Whether this is an Elastic case

binaryStoreLocation.description: The binary store location for this case, if applicable

productName.description: The name of the product that created / opened this case

version.description: The version of Nuix that most recently opened this case

isOpen.description: Whether or not this case is currently open, which means something in REST is working with this case

childCases.description: The child cases of this case, when applicable.  If the child case is known to this REST instance then the value will be the child case's GUID.  Otherwise it will be the absolute path to the child case

url.description: The URL of the REST instance that contains this case

serverId.description: The Server ID of the REST instance that contains this case
